title: Pedra Viva Festival at Lithica
location: Pedreres de s'Hostal (Lithica) y otros espacios patrimoniales, Ciutadella
description: A performing-arts festival staged in non-theatrical spaces, celebrating its 15th edition with a smaller but bolder, more experimental line-up: four major shows (including 'The Weight of Water' and Buika) plus the Pedra en Viu series featuring Balearic companies, at the old s'Hostal sandstone quarries and other heritage sites. Confirm exact dates and venues in the official programme.
